displayDescription.zh:
奥利弗·塞尔弗里奇在 1959 年用“群魔殿”描述一种分层模式识别系统。最底层的“图像魔鬼”接收输入，特征魔鬼寻找线条、角度等局部线索，认知魔鬼把这些线索组合成候选模式；最上层的决策者根据谁“喊得最响”选择识别结果。

这个拟人化隐喻强调复杂感知可以由许多简单、并行且相互竞争的单元产生，而不必依赖单一中央规则。原始系统仍较粗糙，但分层特征、分布式证据和竞争性决策的思想影响了后来的模式识别、黑板系统和集成方法，也预示了神经网络中的层级表示。
displayDescription.en:
Oliver Selfridge described Pandemonium in 1959 as a layered pattern-recognition system. “Image demons” receive the input, feature demons detect local evidence such as lines and angles, cognitive demons combine those features into candidate patterns, and a decision demon chooses the interpretation whose advocates “shout” most strongly.

The anthropomorphic metaphor emphasized that complex perception could emerge from many simple, parallel, competing units rather than one central rule. The original implementation was limited, but its hierarchy of features, distributed evidence, and competitive decision-making influenced later pattern recognition, blackboard systems, and ensemble methods. It also anticipated the broader idea of layered representations in neural computation.

description.en: Primary paper for Selfridge's layered demon architecture and feature-vote recognition metaphor.
description.zh: 主要论文： 塞尔弗里奇的分层“魔鬼”架构与特征投票识别隐喻。

html.zh: 早期 AI 需要比一次性手写模板更不脆弱的模式识别模型。 这段背景帮助观众把Pandemonium 感知架构放回当时的技术问题和研究重点中理解。
html.en: Early AI needed models for pattern recognition that were less brittle than hand-coded one-shot templates. This context helps viewers place Pandemonium in the technical problems and research priorities of its time.

html.zh: 多个小型识别器响应特征；较强响应向上传播，直到形成获胜解释。 关键机制是分层特征检测与投票，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。
html.en: Multiple small recognizers respond to features; stronger responses propagate upward until a winning interpretation emerges. The key mechanism is Layered feature detection and voting, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Pandemonium 视为有影响力的早期分布式模式识别模型。它的长期影响在于把感知理解为分层检测器之间的证据累积，这一思想在集成方法和分层识别系统中仍有回响。
html.en: Experts generally treat Pandemonium as an influential early model of distributed pattern recognition. Its long-term legacy is the idea of perception as evidence accumulation across layered detectors, which echoes in ensemble methods and hierarchical recognition systems.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.

demo.en: Aggregate feature votes into a pattern decision
demo.zh: 把特征投票聚合成模式决策

text.en: Small recognizers fire for local evidence.
text.zh: 小型识别器针对局部证据激活。

text.en: Higher-level hypotheses compete using lower-level signals.
text.zh: 高层假设利用低层信号竞争。

text.en: Recognition emerges from many partial votes.
text.zh: 识别来自许多局部投票的汇聚。
